title: About me
description:
I’m a software engineer focused on turning operational problems into useful systems. I work from process understanding to implementation, connecting application code, backend, cloud, integrations, and automation to reduce manual effort and improve delivery.

I have experience with web applications, APIs, services, infrastructure, integrations, and performance optimization in real systems. I work with attention to architecture, evolutionary maintenance, and technical clarity, aiming for solutions that are simple to operate, measure, and evolve.

thesis.label: position
thesis.statement: I design software as the operating system of the business, from rule to delivery.
thesis.detail: The solution should reveal technical judgment: clear contracts, measurable flow, observable performance, and an operation that does not rely on improvisation.

integration.title: Integrations
integration.description: I connect systems, APIs, and data flows with clear contracts, reducing manual work and failures between teams and platforms.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: I investigate bottlenecks in applications and databases, using practical analysis to reduce response time and operational cost.

impact.title: Fast impact
impact.description: I understand existing processes, prioritize points of friction, and deliver incremental improvements with a clear operational effect.

frontend.title: Web applications
frontend.description: React flows connected to rules, APIs, and real operational use.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: APIs, services, and integrations with clear domain boundaries, well-defined contracts, and attention to performance.

devops.title: Cloud & DevOps
devops.description: Infrastructure, pipelines, observability, and automation to deliver software with predictability.
